revision.comment:

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1952年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1952]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۵۲-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[az:Category:1952-ci ildə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:1952 in Japan]] [[cs:Category:Japonsko v roce 1952]] [[eo:Category:1952 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1952]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۵۲ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1952 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1952 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1952]] [[ko:Category:1952년 일본]] [[nn:Category:1952 i Japan]] [[no:Category:1952 i Japan]] [[pt:Category:1952 no Japão]] [[ru:Category:1952 год в Японии]] [[sv:Category:1952 i Japan]] [[uk:Category:1952 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1952ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1952]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1952 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1952年日本]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1952年設置の日本の市町村]].

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q6811635}} (found via Wikipedia API)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6811635}}
<!--interwikis-->
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1952_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
